title: Limbus Comapny - E.G.O. Gifts Pack
description: change a few item into the E.G.O. Gift From Limbus Company
body:
change a few item into the E.G.O. Gift From [Limbus Company](https://store.steampowered.com/app/1973530/Limbus_Company/)

what's changed:
![change log](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3935babaac2f1fb795a0aa1ca202922c03cc1345.png)
- "Blue Zippo Lighter" → Iron and Steel 
- "Illusory Hunt" and "Mental Corruption Boosting Gas" → Potions
- "Black Sheet Music" → Paper
- "Pain of Stifled Rage" → Fire Charge 
- "Ardent Flower" → Blaze Powder
- "Feather of Honor" → Blaze Rod
- "Smoking Gunpowder" → Gun Powder
- "Keenbranch" → Stick 
- "Oracle" → Nether Star
- "Tangled Bones" → Bone
- "Cask Spirits" → Firework Star
- "Trial Plan Guide" → Writable Book
- "Plume of Proof" → Feather
- "Dueling Manual Book 3" → Written Book
- "The Book of Vengeance" → Knowledge Book
- "Twinkling Vestige" → suger
- "La Manchaland All-day Pass" → Filled Map
- "Hot ‘n Juicy Drumstick" → Cooked Chicken 
- "Dry-to-the-Bone Breast" → Chicken
- "Hardship" → Totem of Undying
- "CQC Manual" → Enchanted Book
- "Chief Butler's Secret Arts" → Book
- "Moon in the Water" → Ghost Tear
- "Broken Compass" → Compass
- "Clear Mirror, Calm Water" → Heart of Sea
- "Brilliant Vestige" → Glowing Dust
- "Ashes to Ashes" → Bone Meal
- "Homeward" → painting
- "La Manchaland Standard Pass" → Map
- "Harestride" → rabbit foot
